title: Yoosso 60Pcs Sandwich Bags, Freezer Bags 1L Medium Food Bags Zip Seal Reusable Ziplock Bags for Food Storage, Snacks, Fruits, Expandable Bottom, Transparent
features: What you get: you will receive 3 boxes of medium zip lock bags, 20 pieces each, 60 pieces in total, the size is 20.5 x 18 cm/ 8.1 x 7.09 inches, the zipper sandwich bags are perfect for daily use, keep your kitchen tidy all the time

Leak-proof design: with double zipper structure, the zipper freezer bag can isolate the air to keep it perfectly airtight, the excellent zipper allows the reusable freezer bag to easily store soups or other liquid juices, no need to worry about leakage, the contents are safe and can be filled standing up

SMART DESIGN - The food bag is transparent, so you can quickly see what's inside. At the same time, the writeable surface of the ziplock bag can be used to record the date or contents inside, you will quickly identify the information

HOMEMADE LUNCH - Prepare and enjoy a homemade lunch in a sandwich bag! Sturdy, functional and easy to use, these sealed bags are a must for busy people who still want to enjoy a delicious homemade lunch at work.

MULTIPURPOSE - Reusable freezer bags can hold different ingredients such as meat, snacks, cookies, candies or fruits to keep them fresh. The zipper bag is also a good choice for storing small items, toiletries or daily necessities when traveling
description: Product Description Quantities: 60 count Material: Plastic Sealed Bag Size: 8 x 7Inch / 21.5 x 18 cm Suitable Food: Meat, sandwiches, nuts, popcorn, candy, fruit Feature: 1. Keep fruits fresh, these reusable sandwich bags can perfectly isolate air and water from food, so the reusable plastic bags will extend the shelf life of fruits and vegetables in the refrigerator. 2. Airtight to keep the bread soft, with the excellent double zipper design, it can keep the taste of food, you can use the food storage bag to take some bread or sandwiches to school or office for lunch. 3. Leak-proof excellent zipper makes the zipper lock sandwich bag can easily store soup or other liquid juice without worrying about leakage, and the bottom can also stand up for filling. 4. Writable surface, there is a writing space on the surface of the food bag, which is convenient for recording the storage date or marking the name of the food on the surface. 5. When on a business trip or traveling, it can be turned into a waterproof bag to store your documents, and also store your cosmetics, etc. Notes: To avoid danger of suffocation, please keep sealed bags away from babies and children.
